title: agrostis malaccensis
intro: Agrostis malaccensis, also known as the Malacca bent grass, is a type of perennial grass that is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its leaves and stems, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Agrostis malaccensis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
